response.justification: Seasoned full-stack engineer with roughly 14 years of professional experience and broad polyglot exposure, but the resume shows no evidence of the AI/ML expertise, principal-level technical leadership, or cloud platform strategy work the role demands. Recent AI-adjacent work is limited to MCP tooling at a current role started in 2025, far short of the recognized AI expertise expected for a Director-level IC.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research to support 'recognized AI expertise'
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope — no evidence of cross-org technical strategy or advising strategic customers
Limited cloud platform depth; AWS CDK mentioned once, no large-scale cloud architecture leadership
